# DS v4 flash Tool Choice Probe

- Date: 2026-05-08
- Base URL: `https://api.modelverse.cn/v1`
- Model: `deepseek-v4-flash`
- Request shape: production-like first LLM request: full `27` tools, `prompt.BuildSystem(...)`, and `system -> user -> assistant -> user` multi-turn history. The user resource context is synthetic to avoid committing real-account resource data; prompt template and tool registry are loaded from production code.
- Stream: `true`
- Pass definition: HTTP 2xx and returned `tool_calls` contains the expected target tool.

## Decision Table

| Tool | Object PASS? | Required PASS? | Auto PASS? | Inferred Root |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|
| `GetCompShareInstanceMonitor` | FAIL(400) | PASS | PASS | thinking-mode / object tool_choice unsupported |
| `DiagnoseBilling` | FAIL(400) | PASS | PASS | thinking-mode / object tool_choice unsupported |
| `DiagnoseSSH` | FAIL(400) | PASS | PASS | object tool_choice unsupported |
| `DiagnoseInitFailure` | FAIL(400) | PASS | PASS | thinking-mode / object tool_choice unsupported |
| `DescribeCompShareInstance` | FAIL(400) | PASS | PASS | object tool_choice unsupported |
| `ResetPasswordWorkflow` | FAIL(400) | FAIL(200) | FAIL(200) | object tool_choice unsupported; required/auto routing mismatch |

## Decision

C. Object tool_choice is not reliably supported across this production request shape. Escalate before changing force-tool behavior or T-007b shadow design.
